Abyss Scarab.flavourText: They search forever for more souls to drag to the dark.
Abyss Scarab.name: Abyss Scarab

Abyss Scarab of Descending.flavourText: They invite you to meet them; to join them.
Abyss Scarab of Descending.name: Abyss Scarab of Descending

Abyss Scarab of Edifice.description: Abysses in Area that do not lead to an Abyssal Depths lead to a Stygian Spire. Abyss pits in Area that do not lead to an Abyssal Depths or spawn an Abyssal Trove will spawn Minor Stygian Spires.
Abyss Scarab of Edifice.flavourText: Their empires ghastly and gaunt glitter with gold.
Abyss Scarab of Edifice.name: Abyss Scarab of Edifice

Abyss Scarab of Multitudes.description: Abysses in Area spawn 50% increased Monsters
Abyss Scarab of Multitudes.flavourText: They ceaselessly sprout from the murderous earth.
Abyss Scarab of Multitudes.name: Abyss Scarab of Multitudes

Abyss Scarab of Profound Depth.description: Monsters from Abysses in Areas have increased Difficulty and Reward for each prior Pit in that Abyss
Abyss Scarab of Profound Depth.flavourText: The deeper we dig, the more we find, be it fortune or foe.
Abyss Scarab of Profound Depth.name: Abyss Scarab of Profound Depth

Ambush Scarab.flavourText: Is it still an ambush if you're expecting it?
Ambush Scarab.name: Ambush Scarab

Ambush Scarab of Containment.description: Area contains many additional Strongboxes. Area's inhabitants are lying in ambush.
Ambush Scarab of Containment.name: Ambush Scarab of Containment

Ambush Scarab of Discernment.description: Strongboxes in Area are more likely to be rarer varieties
Ambush Scarab of Discernment.flavourText: A keen eye sorts the worthy from the chaff.
Ambush Scarab of Discernment.name: Ambush Scarab of Discernment

Ambush Scarab of Hidden Compartments.description: 15% Chance for Strongboxes in Area to be openable again
Ambush Scarab of Hidden Compartments.flavourText: Beneath the obvious lies the real treasure...
Ambush Scarab of Hidden Compartments.name: Ambush Scarab of Hidden Compartments

Ambush Scarab of Potency.description: 75% Increased effect of Explicit Modifiers on Strongboxes in Area
Ambush Scarab of Potency.flavourText: The locksmith dreams of building a better box.
Ambush Scarab of Potency.name: Ambush Scarab of Potency

Anarchy Scarab.flavourText: On Wraeclast, it's kill or be killed.
Anarchy Scarab.name: Anarchy Scarab

Anarchy Scarab of Gigantification.description: Wild Rogue Exiles in Area have a 30% chance to be replaced with a Rogue Giant
Anarchy Scarab of Gigantification.flavourText: The consumption of sulphite can cause strange growth.
Anarchy Scarab of Gigantification.name: Anarchy Scarab of Gigantification

Anarchy Scarab of Partnership.description: Wild Rogue Exiles in Area have a 50% chance to appear in pairs
Anarchy Scarab of Partnership.flavourText: Among exiles, alliances shift and change constantly.
Anarchy Scarab of Partnership.name: Anarchy Scarab of Partnership

Anarchy Scarab of the Exceptional.description: Area contains an additional Exceptional Rogue Exile
Anarchy Scarab of the Exceptional.flavourText: Among many, one stands above the rest.
Anarchy Scarab of the Exceptional.name: Anarchy Scarab of the Exceptional

Bestiary Scarab of Duplicating.description: Create a copy of Beasts captured in Area
Bestiary Scarab of Duplicating.flavourText: What's better than one captured beast, exile?
Bestiary Scarab of Duplicating.name: Bestiary Scarab of Duplicating

Bestiary Scarab of the Herd.description: Area contains 5 additional Red Beasts if it contains Einhar
Bestiary Scarab of the Herd.flavourText: The First Ones ran rampant and free in the forests of old.
Bestiary Scarab of the Herd.name: Bestiary Scarab of the Herd

Betrayal Scarab.flavourText: The Syndicate must pay for what they have done.
Betrayal Scarab.name: Betrayal Scarab

Betrayal Scarab of Reinforcements.description: Immortal Syndicate Members in Area have 50% increased chance to be accompanied by reinforcements
Betrayal Scarab of Reinforcements.name: Betrayal Scarab of Reinforcements

Betrayal Scarab of Unbreaking.description: Syndicate Members in Area have a chance to not lose Ranks when they are Interrogated
Betrayal Scarab of Unbreaking.flavourText: Dying over and over builds a tolerance to pain.
Betrayal Scarab of Unbreaking.name: Betrayal Scarab of Unbreaking

Betrayal Scarab of the Allflame.description: 75% Increased number of Monster Packs Substituted by Allflame Embers in Area
Betrayal Scarab of the Allflame.flavourText: Those that can never die fear only pain.
Betrayal Scarab of the Allflame.name: Betrayal Scarab of the Allflame

Beyond Scarab.description: Slaying enemies close together in Area can attract monsters from Beyond this realm
Beyond Scarab.flavourText: The silent wall and the raging storm oppose the endless swarm.
Beyond Scarab.name: Beyond Scarab

Beyond Scarab of Haemophilia.description: Beyond Portals in Area have 50% increased Merging Radius. Characters that Kill Beyond Rare Monsters in Area have a 30% chance to gain their Modifiers for 20 seconds.
Beyond Scarab of Haemophilia.name: Beyond Scarab of Haemophilia

Beyond Scarab of Resurgence.description: Beyond Bosses in Area are enraged on low life. Beyond Bosses in Area drop 100% increased Tainted Currency. Beyond Portals in Area have 30% increased chance to spawn a Unique Boss.
Beyond Scarab of Resurgence.name: Beyond Scarab of Resurgence

Beyond Scarab of the Invasion.description: Rare and Unique Monsters slain in Area create 8 to 12 additional Beyond Portals
Beyond Scarab of the Invasion.flavourText: The fated hour is almost nigh.
Beyond Scarab of the Invasion.name: Beyond Scarab of the Invasion

Blight Scarab of Blooming.description: Blight Encounters in Area have up to 3 additional Unique Bosses. Unique enemies in Blight Encounters have 100% increased life. Tier 14+ Blighted Maps found in Area drop as Blight-Ravaged Maps instead.
Blight Scarab of Blooming.flavourText: Once a century, the Blight spills forth...
Blight Scarab of Blooming.name: Blight Scarab of Blooming

Blight Scarab of Invigoration.description: Each Empowering Tower in Areas grants Blighted Monsters in range increased Difficulty and Reward
Blight Scarab of Invigoration.flavourText: Reversing the polarity of the compression modulator seems to have intriguing effects...
Blight Scarab of Invigoration.name: Blight Scarab of Invigoration

Blight Scarab of the Blightheart.description: Blight Encounters in Area have one Blighted Chest. Blight Encounters in Area spawn many more waves of Enemies. Blighted Chests in Area grow larger and more rewarding the more Blighted Enemies are slain.
Blight Scarab of the Blightheart.flavourText: The core grows larger with each cycle, doomed to spill forth...
Blight Scarab of the Blightheart.name: Blight Scarab of the Blightheart

Breach Scarab of Resonant Cascade.description: Unstable Breaches in Areas are 10% faster for each Unstable Breach already opened. Monsters from Unstable Breaches in Areas have increased Difficulty and Reward for each Unstable Breach already opened.
Breach Scarab of Resonant Cascade.flavourText: Reality weakens with each new wound.
Breach Scarab of Resonant Cascade.name: Breach Scarab of Resonant Cascade

Breach Scarab of the Incensed Swarm.description: Ailith's skills in Area instead enrage the Hive, increasing the Difficulty and Reward of subsequent waves
Breach Scarab of the Incensed Swarm.name: Breach Scarab of the Incensed Swarm

Breach Scarab of the Marshal.description: Unstable Breaches in Area contain a Boss. Breach Hives in Area lead to a Hive Fortress.
Breach Scarab of the Marshal.name: Breach Scarab of the Marshal

Cartography Scarab of Corruption.description: Non-Unique Maps found in Area are Corrupted with 8 Modifiers
Cartography Scarab of Corruption.name: Cartography Scarab of Corruption

Cartography Scarab of Escalation.description: 10% increased Maps found in Area for each Map Modifier affecting Area
Cartography Scarab of Escalation.flavourText: Opportunity thrives where dreams are most perilous.
Cartography Scarab of Escalation.name: Cartography Scarab of Escalation

Cartography Scarab of Risk.flavourText: What we see in the mirror can only be our own reflection.
Cartography Scarab of Risk.name: Cartography Scarab of Risk

Cartography Scarab of the Multitude.description: Area contains 8 to 12 additional packs of Difficult and Rewarding Monsters which drop 300% increased Maps
Cartography Scarab of the Multitude.flavourText: There is no end, no horizon.
Cartography Scarab of the Multitude.name: Cartography Scarab of the Multitude

Delirium Scarab.description: Area contains a Mirror of Delirium
Delirium Scarab.flavourText: A perfectly innocuous Scarab that does nothing at all.
Delirium Scarab.name: Delirium Scarab

Delirium Scarab of Delusions.description: Maps found in Area have layers of Delirium
Delirium Scarab of Delusions.flavourText: What are you talking about? The Atlas was always like this.
Delirium Scarab of Delusions.name: Delirium Scarab of Delusions

Delirium Scarab of Mania.description: Delirium Reward Meters fill 100% faster in Area. Delirium in Area increases 50% faster with distance from the mirror.
Delirium Scarab of Mania.flavourText: They're so loud! Why are they so loud?! All you can do is scream!
Delirium Scarab of Mania.name: Delirium Scarab of Mania

Delirium Scarab of Neuroses.description: Delirium Encounters in Area contain all Unique Delirium Bosses. Can only be used with Tier 11+ Maps.
Delirium Scarab of Neuroses.flavourText: Toothy grins shine in the dark.
Delirium Scarab of Neuroses.name: Delirium Scarab of Neuroses

Delirium Scarab of Paranoia.description: Delirium Encounters in Area generate 2 additional Reward types
Delirium Scarab of Paranoia.flavourText: If it seems too good to be true...
Delirium Scarab of Paranoia.name: Delirium Scarab of Paranoia

Divination Scarab of Pilfering.description: Divination Cards which drop in Area are stolen by a Final Map Boss. That Final Map Boss becomes more Difficult and deals increased Damage the more Divination Cards they have stolen. That Final Map Boss duplicates all stolen Divination Cards when defeated.
Divination Scarab of Pilfering.flavourText: If you do not seize your fate, someone else will.
Divination Scarab of Pilfering.name: Divination Scarab of Pilfering

Divination Scarab of Plenty.description: Area contains 6 to 10 additional Packs of Divination Touched Magic Monsters that have 1000% increased chance to drop Divination Cards
Divination Scarab of Plenty.flavourText: We create a thousand futures with every action.
Divination Scarab of Plenty.name: Divination Scarab of Plenty

Divination Scarab of The Cloister.description: Area contains 8 to 12 additional packs of Doedre's Devoted. Doedre's Devoted have 1% additional chance to drop a Stacked Deck.
Divination Scarab of The Cloister.flavourText: No disease can be contained forever.
Divination Scarab of The Cloister.name: Divination Scarab of The Cloister

Domination Scarab.flavourText: A simple exchange. Blood for power.
Domination Scarab.name: Domination Scarab

Domination Scarab of Apparitions.flavourText: Some paths to power lead only to madness.
Domination Scarab of Apparitions.name: Domination Scarab of Apparitions

Domination Scarab of Evolution.description: Area contains an additional Evolving Shrine
Domination Scarab of Evolution.flavourText: The Atlas and Wraeclast share one terrifying secret.
Domination Scarab of Evolution.name: Domination Scarab of Evolution

Domination Scarab of Terrors.description: Shrines in Area are guarded by an Atlas Boss. Modifiers to the Final Map Boss also apply to these Atlas Bosses.
Domination Scarab of Terrors.flavourText: Whatever the prize, fight for it.
Domination Scarab of Terrors.name: Domination Scarab of Terrors

Essence Scarab.flavourText: It is perfectly safe, the creatures trapped inside couldn't possibly still be living.
Essence Scarab.name: Essence Scarab

Essence Scarab of Adaptation.description: Imprisoned Monsters released in Areas grant a random Essence Modifier to another Imprisoned Monster in the Area. Imprisoned Monsters in Areas have increased Difficulty and Reward for each Essence Modifier.
Essence Scarab of Adaptation.flavourText: The crystalline lattice expands in directions alien to the mortal mind.
Essence Scarab of Adaptation.name: Essence Scarab of Adaptation

Essence Scarab of Ascent.description: Essences found in Area are a tier higher
Essence Scarab of Ascent.flavourText: A more perfect facet cannot be achieved.
Essence Scarab of Ascent.name: Essence Scarab of Ascent

Essence Scarab of Calcification.description: Rare monsters that are natural inhabitants of the Area are imprisoned by Essences
Essence Scarab of Calcification.name: Essence Scarab of Calcification

Essence Scarab of Stability.description: Corrupting an Essence in Area can only result in upgrading or transforming Essences
Essence Scarab of Stability.flavourText: With the right tools and a precise hand, the manipulation of the crystals can be made predictable.
Essence Scarab of Stability.name: Essence Scarab of Stability

Expedition Scarab.flavourText: They come from across the sea in search of ancient truth.
Expedition Scarab.name: Expedition Scarab

Expedition Scarab of Archaeology.description: Remnants in Expedition Encounters in Area have 2 additional Suffixes and Prefixes
Expedition Scarab of Archaeology.flavourText: Curiosity leads to wisdom. Wisdom leads to power.
Expedition Scarab of Archaeology.name: Expedition Scarab of Archaeology

Expedition Scarab of Infusion.description: Logbooks dropped in Areas always drop with 4 implicit modifiers. Expedition monsters gain increased Difficulty and Reward for each Remnant detonated.
Expedition Scarab of Infusion.flavourText: Starlight empowers even the dead if bathed long enough.
Expedition Scarab of Infusion.name: Expedition Scarab of Infusion

Expedition Scarab of Runefinding.description: Expedition Encounters in Area have 100% increased number of Runic Monster Markers
Expedition Scarab of Runefinding.flavourText: That which came from the stars longs to return.
Expedition Scarab of Runefinding.name: Expedition Scarab of Runefinding

Expedition Scarab of Verisium Powder.description: Expedition Encounters in Area have 50% increased number of Explosives. 80% increased Explosive Radius.
Expedition Scarab of Verisium Powder.flavourText: A properly refined pinch makes all the difference.
Expedition Scarab of Verisium Powder.name: Expedition Scarab of Verisium Powder

Harvest Scarab.flavourText: Hidden routes lead to vales of shadow and light...
Harvest Scarab.name: Harvest Scarab

Harvest Scarab of Cornucopia.description: If Area contains the Sacred Grove, it will contain up to 1 additional Tier 4 seed of each type, if possible
Harvest Scarab of Cornucopia.flavourText: The taller the tree, the better the fruit.
Harvest Scarab of Cornucopia.name: Harvest Scarab of Cornucopia

Harvest Scarab of Doubling.description: Lifeforce dropped by Harvest Monsters in Area is duplicated. Harvest Monsters in Area have 100% more Life.
Harvest Scarab of Doubling.name: Harvest Scarab of Doubling

Horned Scarab of Awakening.description: Tier 16 + Areas contain the Bosses from a random Maven Invitation
Horned Scarab of Awakening.flavourText: The Atlas can be anything you want... and everything you want.
Horned Scarab of Awakening.name: Horned Scarab of Awakening

Horned Scarab of Bloodlines.description: Area has 150% increased Magic Monsters. Magic Monsters in area have an additional Modifier.
Horned Scarab of Bloodlines.flavourText: Only the hardiest survive. Only survivors perpetuate.
Horned Scarab of Bloodlines.name: Horned Scarab of Bloodlines

Horned Scarab of Glittering.description: Players in Area gain increased Item Rarity for each Monster slain, up to 400%, decaying over time
Horned Scarab of Glittering.flavourText: Wealth flows to those that shine brightest.
Horned Scarab of Glittering.name: Horned Scarab of Glittering

Horned Scarab of Nemeses.description: Rare Monsters in Area have 2 additional Modifiers
Horned Scarab of Nemeses.flavourText: Glory draws ever tighter its own doom.
Horned Scarab of Nemeses.name: Horned Scarab of Nemeses

Horned Scarab of Pandemonium.description: Monster packs in Area have a 15% chance to be replaced by a random Atlas Boss. Modifiers to the Final Map Boss also apply to these Atlas Bosses.
Horned Scarab of Pandemonium.flavourText: Punctured dreams bleed into the mind.
Horned Scarab of Pandemonium.name: Horned Scarab of Pandemonium

Horned Scarab of Preservation.description: Other Scarabs are not consumed on use
Horned Scarab of Preservation.flavourText: We must not forget those who came before.
Horned Scarab of Preservation.name: Horned Scarab of Preservation

Horned Scarab of Tradition.description: All Rare and Unique Monsters in Area have dropped items transformed by a Reward Modifier
Horned Scarab of Tradition.flavourText: To the strongest, prosperity be thine.
Horned Scarab of Tradition.name: Horned Scarab of Tradition

Incursion Scarab.flavourText: Uncover the secrets of the Vaal one incursion at a time.
Incursion Scarab.name: Incursion Scarab

Incursion Scarab of Champions.description: Incursions in Area have a 35% chance for all Monsters to be at least Magic. Incursions in Area have 15% increased Pack Size.
Incursion Scarab of Champions.flavourText: Only the best served in Atzoatl.
Incursion Scarab of Champions.name: Incursion Scarab of Champions

Incursion Scarab of Invasion.description: Area contains 12 to 16 additional packs of Incursion Monsters
Incursion Scarab of Invasion.flavourText: A gate, once opened, may swing in either direction.
Incursion Scarab of Invasion.name: Incursion Scarab of Invasion

Incursion Scarab of Timelines.description: Final Architect slain in Area will drop an Itemised Temple. Itemised Temples dropped in Area are generated based on current Temple layout, but with randomised room tiers.
Incursion Scarab of Timelines.flavourText: They say if you go far enough, you will meet yourself...
Incursion Scarab of Timelines.name: Incursion Scarab of Timelines

Influencing Scarab of Hordes.description: Influenced Monster Packs in Area have 40% increased Pack Size
Influencing Scarab of Hordes.name: Influencing Scarab of Hordes

Influencing Scarab of Interference.description: Tier 14+ Maps found in Area have a chance to drop as Shaper Guardian, Elder Guardian, Conqueror or Unique Synthesised Maps instead
Influencing Scarab of Interference.flavourText: Memories resound in the Atlas, echoing forever.
Influencing Scarab of Interference.name: Influencing Scarab of Interference

Influencing Scarab of the Elder.description: Adds Elder Influence outcome to Area
Influencing Scarab of the Elder.flavourText: Beyond the light lies only the void.
Influencing Scarab of the Elder.name: Influencing Scarab of the Elder

Influencing Scarab of the Shaper.description: Adds Shaper Influence outcome to Area
Influencing Scarab of the Shaper.flavourText: A sea of stars awaits those who dare imagine.
Influencing Scarab of the Shaper.name: Influencing Scarab of the Shaper

Kalguuran Scarab of Enriching.description: Increases the amount of Ore gained from Ore Deposits. Increases the Difficulty and Reward of monsters guarding Ore Deposits for every completed Ore Deposit in the Area.
Kalguuran Scarab of Enriching.flavourText: The ore lives and breathes; and is not happy with your efforts.
Kalguuran Scarab of Enriching.name: Kalguuran Scarab of Enriching

Kalguuran Scarab of Guarded Riches.description: Monsters guarding Ore Deposits in Area are at least Magic
Kalguuran Scarab of Guarded Riches.name: Kalguuran Scarab of Guarded Riches

Kalguuran Scarab of Refinement.description: Ore Deposits in Area grant Smelted Bars instead of Marking Ore
Kalguuran Scarab of Refinement.flavourText: Ore's true worth lies not in stone, but in what it becomes.
Kalguuran Scarab of Refinement.name: Kalguuran Scarab of Refinement

Legion Scarab.description: Area contains an additional Legion Encounter
Legion Scarab.flavourText: What good is peace to a warrior?
Legion Scarab.name: Legion Scarab

Legion Scarab of Eternal Conflict.description: Legion Monsters in Area can be broken out of Stasis multiple times. Legion Monsters in Area gain increased Difficulty and Reward for each time they are broken out.
Legion Scarab of Eternal Conflict.name: Legion Scarab of Eternal Conflict

Legion Scarab of Officers.description: Legion Factions in Area have 5 additional Sergeants
Legion Scarab of Officers.flavourText: Even a battlefield has middle management.
Legion Scarab of Officers.name: Legion Scarab of Officers

Legion Scarab of Treasures.description: Legion Chests in Area have a 20 % chance to spread their Rewards to Legion Monsters they release from stasis when they are broken out Legion Monsters that have gained Rewards have increased Difficulty
Legion Scarab of Treasures.flavourText: Ancient Hoards imbued with powerful Artifacts.
Legion Scarab of Treasures.name: Legion Scarab of Treasures

Ritual Scarab of Abundance.description: Rituals in Area offer 100% increased Favours
Ritual Scarab of Abundance.name: Ritual Scarab of Abundance

Ritual Scarab of Corpses.description: Rituals in Area contain an additional Rare Itemised Corpse Monster
Ritual Scarab of Corpses.flavourText: Reduced to mere Puppets; they yearn for life once more.
Ritual Scarab of Corpses.name: Ritual Scarab of Corpses

Ritual Scarab of Selectiveness.description: Rerolling Favours at Ritual Altars in Area has no cost the first 2 times. Ritual Altars in Area allow rerolling Favours 2 additional times.
Ritual Scarab of Selectiveness.flavourText: Pick and choose which sacred tenets you prefer...
Ritual Scarab of Selectiveness.name: Ritual Scarab of Selectiveness

Ritual Scarab of Wisps.description: Ritual Altars in Area spawn a Wildwood Wisp. Wildwood Wisps grant 100% increased Tribute Gained to nearby Players.
Ritual Scarab of Wisps.flavourText: Trust in the Draíocht, and you shall never be alone.
Ritual Scarab of Wisps.name: Ritual Scarab of Wisps

Scarab of Adversaries.description: Area contains 4 additional Packs with Mirrored Rare Monsters
Scarab of Adversaries.flavourText: They stand against you with equal enmity.
Scarab of Adversaries.name: Scarab of Adversaries

Scarab of Divinity.description: Up to 3 additional Rare Monsters in Area will be Pantheon-Touched. Apparitions spawned by Pantheon-Touched Monsters deal 100% increased damage.
Scarab of Divinity.name: Scarab of Divinity

Scarab of Monstrous Lineage.flavourText: The bloodlines evolve faster than they can be culled.
Scarab of Monstrous Lineage.name: Scarab of Monstrous Lineage

Scarab of Radiant Storms.flavourText: The great cacophony of life roars to a crescendo.
Scarab of Radiant Storms.name: Scarab of Radiant Storms

Scarab of Stability.description: Portals to Area have a 50% chance to not be consumed on use
Scarab of Stability.flavourText: Astonishing! A means to sustain the connection...
Scarab of Stability.name: Scarab of Stability

Scarab of Wisps.description: Monsters in Area have a chance to be Empowered by 2000 Wildwood Wisps
Scarab of Wisps.flavourText: The Draíocht connects everything that lives.
Scarab of Wisps.name: Scarab of Wisps

Scarab of the Dextral.description: 100% increased effect of Area Suffix Modifiers. Area Prefix Modifiers have no effect.
Scarab of the Dextral.flavourText: Flip a coin, do you wish for Tails?
Scarab of the Dextral.name: Scarab of the Dextral

Scarab of the Sinistral.description: 100% increased effect of Area Prefix Modifiers. Area Suffix Modifiers have no effect.
Scarab of the Sinistral.flavourText: Flip a coin, do you wish for Heads?
Scarab of the Sinistral.name: Scarab of the Sinistral

Sulphite Scarab.description: Area contains Niko. Map owner gains 150% more Sulphite.
Sulphite Scarab.flavourText: Delve into darkness in search of the truth...
Sulphite Scarab.name: Sulphite Scarab

Sulphite Scarab of Fumes.description: Sulphite found in Map Area releases Enraging Fumes. Monsters affected by Enraging Fumes have 50% increased Item Quantity. Sulphite in your maps is guarded by Monsters from the Azurite Mine.
Sulphite Scarab of Fumes.flavourText: When the land itself is sick, even the very ground rots and spills forth.
Sulphite Scarab of Fumes.name: Sulphite Scarab of Fumes

Titanic Scarab.description: Unique Monsters have 1% increased Toughness, Damage, Rarity and Quantity of items dropped per 1% increased Pack Size of Area
Titanic Scarab.flavourText: What power lies in a name?
Titanic Scarab.name: Titanic Scarab

Titanic Scarab of Legend.description: Unique Monsters in Area have 4 additional Monster Modifiers
Titanic Scarab of Legend.name: Titanic Scarab of Legend

Titanic Scarab of Treasures.description: Unique Monsters in Area have an additional Reward. Unique Monsters in Area have 30% increased Toughness.
Titanic Scarab of Treasures.flavourText: Greed is a trap of the mind.
Titanic Scarab of Treasures.name: Titanic Scarab of Treasures

Torment Scarab.description: Area is haunted by 4 additional Tormented Spirits. Tormented Spirits in Area have a 10% chance to be set free when Possessed Monsters are slain and dig up a Possessed Monster.
Torment Scarab.flavourText: Their crimes in life haunt you in death.
Torment Scarab.name: Torment Scarab

Torment Scarab of Peculiarity.description: Tormented Spirits in Area are replaced with unusual variants
Torment Scarab of Peculiarity.flavourText: Now there's a blood-curdling wail I haven't heard before!
Torment Scarab of Peculiarity.name: Torment Scarab of Peculiarity

Torment Scarab of Possession.description: Rare Monsters in Area have a quarter chance to be Possessed by up to 3 Tormented Spirits
Torment Scarab of Possession.flavourText: The strong are never truly alone.
Torment Scarab of Possession.name: Torment Scarab of Possession

Ultimatum Scarab.flavourText: A challenge may be requested at any time.
Ultimatum Scarab.name: Ultimatum Scarab

Ultimatum Scarab of Bribing.description: Ultimatum Monsters grant 150% increased Experience. Ultimatum Encounters grant rewards as though you completed 2 additional Rounds.
Ultimatum Scarab of Bribing.flavourText: A trial is only as incorruptible as its judge.
Ultimatum Scarab of Bribing.name: Ultimatum Scarab of Bribing

Ultimatum Scarab of Catalysing.description: Ultimatum Encounters in Area will only offer Catalysts as Rewards to the Map Owner
Ultimatum Scarab of Catalysing.flavourText: Most regret finding out how the powder is made.
Ultimatum Scarab of Catalysing.name: Ultimatum Scarab of Catalysing

Ultimatum Scarab of Dueling.description: Ultimatum Encounters in Area will always lead to a Unique Boss if possible
Ultimatum Scarab of Dueling.flavourText: Victory is meaningless, failure will be mocked.
Ultimatum Scarab of Dueling.name: Ultimatum Scarab of Dueling

Ultimatum Scarab of Inscription.description: Ultimatum Encounter rewards in Area offering Catalysts will offer Inscribed Ultimatums to the Map Owner instead
Ultimatum Scarab of Inscription.flavourText: There is always a wager to be made... if you can afford it.
Ultimatum Scarab of Inscription.name: Ultimatum Scarab of Inscription
